title: SynthesisResult
description: Typed output schema for the UXR Synthesis workflow artifact. Embedded as <!-- caretta:synthesis_result {...} --> in the uxr-synthesis GitHub issue body so downstream workflows (Strategic Review, Sprint Planning) can validate the hand-off.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the synthesis agent run completed (e.g. "2026-05-15T10:30:00Z").

priority_count.description: Number of top priorities identified in the synthesis.

top_persona.description: Dominant persona signal identified this cycle (e.g. "payments-settlement-engineer"). Empty string if no clear signal.
